GENERAL COMMISSIONS

These commissions are charged by Cryptoforextradex for the platform to work. They are not related to the profit received by our investors

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    0.5% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire Cryptoforextradex structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    0.5% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    0.5% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire Cryptoforextradex structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    0.5% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    0.5% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire Cryptoforextradex structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    0.5% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

BEST Cryptoforextradex TRADERS

The best cryptocurrency developers works in our company. They have a wealth of experience and understanding of the crypto market behind them. They brought Cryptoforextradex to the world level of development

UNIQUE TRADING BOT

Cryptoforextradex team of professionals has created a unique trading robot that makes profit at any stage of the market: rise or fall

STABLE AND AUTOMATED INVESTMENT

The robot is not human-related. And that is why all investments are reliable and completely safe

THE EXPERTS WILL DO EVERYTHING FOR YOU

The highly professional Cryptoforextradex team controls all the processes of the trading robot around the clock. After investing, you will observe the growth of your capital in real time

3 STEPS TO START

#1

REGISTRATION

Click the Register button. Fill in your details to create a FREE Cryptoforextradex account in seconds

#2

CHOOSE INVESTMENT PLAN

We offer a variety of investment plans to suit your financial goals. After reading, make a deposit

#3

START EARNING

After making a deposit, watch your capital grow by accumulating daily profit in real time

REFERRAL PROGRAM

Anyone can take part in the affiliate program. It allows you to receive generous rewards by inviting new members

  • 4 LEVELS OF REFERRAL PROGRAM

    Get extra profit when people in your structure invite new investors to the company

  • 7% - 3%
    2% - 1%

VIDEO PRESENTATION

ROBOT TRADING WITHOUT WEEKENDS AND HOLIDAYS

WITHDRAWAL 24/7

BIG NUMBER OF PAYMENT SYSTEMS

100% ANONYMOUS AND TRANSPARENCY OF THE WORK OF THE ROBOT

Cryptoforextradex supports a big number of payment systems

Our company does not charge commissions for opening a deposit, as well as withdrawing funds from the platform
